postReview.title: Vanney offers no excuses after LA Galaxy slump to 7-0 loss
postReview.description: In a rematch of last year's MLS Cup final, the struggling LA Galaxy were routed 7-0 by the New York Red Bulls on Saturday.

preReview.title: New York Red Bulls v LA Galaxy: Vanney urges visitors to cut out mistakes in search of first win
preReview.description: The LA Galaxy will be hoping to get their first MLS victory on the board this weekend when they face the New York Red Bulls this weekend.

QAData.question: Who won between New York Red Bulls and LA Galaxy on Sat, 10 May 2025 23:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: New York Red Bulls won 7–0 over LA Galaxy on Sat, 10 May 2025 23:30:00 GMT.
